description_long: This object is a small, delicate flowering plant with two pale yellow flowers perched atop slender green stems. The flowers have a simple, open structure with several rounded petals radiating from a central core. The foliage consists of multiple elongated, serrated leaves arranged in a feather-like pattern, giving the plant a lush and textured appearance. The stems are thin and upright, supporting the flowers above the leafy base. The overall form is airy and light, with the leaves spreading outward and the flowers rising above. This plant would commonly be found in urban parks, gardens, or landscaped sidewalk areas.
description: A small, leafy plant with two pale yellow flowers on slender green stems and feathery, serrated leaves. The flowers are open and delicate, rising above the lush foliage.
description_view_0: Two yellow flowers on tall stems are visible, with feathery green leaves spreading outward and upward.
description_view_1: The main flower is centered and prominent, with the leaves forming a dense, horizontal spread beneath it.
description_view_2: Both flowers are visible from the side, with the leaves fanning out and the stems appearing more upright.
description_view_3: The central flower faces forward, surrounded by a dense arrangement of serrated leaves, with the second flower visible in the background.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with each petal spreading outward symmetrically from the center of the flower. There is slight overlapping at the base, creating a whorled appearance.
